component.name: GridItem
component.script:
sub init() m.bg = m.top.findNode("bg") m.border = m.top.findNode("border") m.timeLabel = m.top.findNode("timeLabel") m.titleLabel = m.top.findNode("titleLabel") end sub
sub itemContentChanged() item = m.top.itemContent if item = invalid then return
m.timeLabel.text = item.time m.titleLabel.text = item.title
palette = item.palette if palette = invalid or palette = "" then palette = "default"
if palette = "sports" m.bg.color = "0x356b8cFF" m.border.color = "0x6fb2d7FF" else if palette = "movies" m.bg.color = "0x7b5d88FF" m.border.color = "0xc3a4d0FF" else if palette = "family" m.bg.color = "0x4f7a5aFF" m.border.color = "0x8dc6a0FF" else m.bg.color = "0x2e4f8fFF" m.border.color = "0x5f86d6FF" end if end sub
